summary: Iteration 3 bug-fix verification: upload-no-autoplay, seek-stability, badge removal. Updated existing pytest assertion (upload no longer sets playing=true) and added new WS test confirming track_change carries playing=false + play/pause/seek propagate. 15/15 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: badge absent, no external CDN scripts/fonts, after upload UI shows Play button (paused) with track metadata and audio element paused at 0.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _handle_play: 'if not room.playing' guard means a 'play' message with new position when already playing is silently ignored (server still re-broadcasts state but position is NOT updated). If user expectation is 'play also resyncs position', this is a minor gap; current behavior is fine per spec since seek is the position-changing op.

server.py upload_track replaces the existing track but does not cancel a pending cleanup_task for the room; in practice the cleanup task is only created on last WS disconnect so this is benign, but worth keeping in mind.
test_credentials: No auth — any non-empty name accepted
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral rooms via POST /api/rooms and clean up via WS-disconnect-driven server cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_syncplay.py now has 15 tests including test_ws_upload_does_not_autoplay_and_play_propagates which guards the iteration-3 spec: upload yields playing=False and explicit play flips state across all clients. Frontend smoke test confirms #emergent-badge absent and no Google Fonts/posthog scripts. The only auto-injected script is Cloudflare beacon which is platform-level, not from index.html.
